requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (TZS / IEC 60335-2-24 under TBS conformity)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（TBS符合性下的TZS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（TBS符合性下的TZS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Tanzanian market must meet the electrical-safety standard adopted by the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS), which is a Tanzania Standard (TZS) adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard IEC 60335-1. Conformity is demonstrated under the TBS mandatory programme: for imported goods this is the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, which requires a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for each regulated consignment before shipment, and affixing of the TBS conformity mark on approved products. Tanzania operates on a 230 V / 50 Hz single-phase domestic supply. Key safety topics mirror the IEC base standard: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, earthing continuity, mechanical strength, and appliance markings. The plug/socket interface in Tanzania is predominantly the BS 1363 (Type G) 3-pin system, so the supplied plug and cord must be appropriate for the destination market.
summary.zh: 投放坦桑尼亚市场的家用制冷器具须符合坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）采用的电气安全标准，即采用IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）的坦桑尼亚标准（TZS），并与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。符合性须在TBS强制计划下证明：对进口货物而言即出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划，要求每批受管制货物在发货前取得符合性证书（CoC），并在获批产品上加贴TBS符合性标志。坦桑尼亚采用230 V/50 Hz单相民用供电。核心安全主题与IEC基础标准一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地连续性、机械强度及器具标识。坦桑尼亚插头/插座接口以BS 1363（G型）三脚系统为主，故随附插头和电源线须适合目的市场。
summary.zht: 投放坦尚尼亞市場的家用製冷器具須符合坦尚尼亞標準局（TBS）採用的電氣安全標準，即採用IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）的坦尚尼亞標準（TZS），並與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。符合性須在TBS強制計畫下證明：對進口貨物而言即出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計畫，要求每批受管制貨物在發貨前取得符合性證書（CoC），並在獲批產品上加貼TBS符合性標誌。坦尚尼亞採用230 V/50 Hz單相民用供電。核心安全主題與IEC基礎標準一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地連續性、機械強度及器具標識。坦尚尼亞插頭/插座接口以BS 1363（G型）三腳系統為主，故隨附插頭和電源線須適合目的市場。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Tanzania) — establishing the Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) and mandatory standards conformity
TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
TZS adopting IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
TBS PVoC programme — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) required per regulated consignment before shipment

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1-2005 (general requirements). GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before domestic sale. Because both the Chinese GB and the Tanzanian TZS standards are derived from the same IEC 60335-2-24 family, the underlying technical content is closely aligned — but a Chinese CCC certificate or domestic CCC test report is not itself accepted as the basis for Tanzanian market entry.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在国内销售。由于中国GB与坦桑尼亚TZS标准均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24体系，底层技术内容高度一致——但中国CCC证书或国内CCC检测报告本身不被接受作为坦桑尼亚市场准入的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在國內銷售。由於中國GB與坦尚尼亞TZS標準均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24體系，底層技術內容高度一致——但中國CCC證書或國內CCC檢測報告本身不被接受作為坦尚尼亞市場准入的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both China (GB 4706.13) and Tanzania (TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24) trace to the same IEC base standard, so the underlying technical content is closely aligned. The gap is procedural and route-based rather than fundamentally technical: (1) Conformity route — Tanzania does not accept a Chinese CCC certificate as proof; the importer/exporter must obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) under the TBS PVoC programme for each regulated consignment before shipment. (2) Acceptable test basis — the practical route is an IECEE CB Scheme test report to IEC 60335-2-24 (plus IEC 60335-1) issued by an IECEE NCB, which a PVoC body can use to issue the CoC; a domestic-only CCC report referencing GB national deviations may need supplementing. (3) Plug/cord and voltage — appliances must be supplied for 230 V / 50 Hz with a BS 1363 (Type G) plug appropriate to Tanzania, which differs from the Chinese domestic plug and 220 V nominal voltage. (4) Markings/instructions — product markings and the TBS mark, plus user instructions, must meet TBS requirements (English is an official language of Tanzania).
gap.zh: 中国（GB 4706.13）与坦桑尼亚（采用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS）均追溯至同一IEC基础标准，故底层技术内容高度一致。差距是程序性、路径性的，而非根本技术性：（1）符合性路径——坦桑尼亚不接受中国CCC证书作为证明；进口商/出口商须为每批受管制货物在发货前依TBS PVoC计划取得符合性证书（CoC）。（2）可接受的检测基准——实际路径为IECEE NCB依据IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）出具的IECEE CB体系检测报告，PVoC机构可据此签发CoC；仅引用GB国家偏差的国内CCC报告可能需补充。（3）插头/电源线与电压——器具须按230 V/50 Hz供应并配适合坦桑尼亚的BS 1363（G型）插头，与中国国内插头及220 V标称电压不同。（4）标识/说明书——产品标识及TBS标志以及用户说明书须符合TBS要求（英语为坦桑尼亚官方语言之一）。
gap.zht: 中國（GB 4706.13）與坦尚尼亞（採用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS）均追溯至同一IEC基礎標準，故底層技術內容高度一致。差距是程序性、路徑性的，而非根本技術性：（1）符合性路徑——坦尚尼亞不接受中國CCC證書作為證明；進口商/出口商須為每批受管制貨物在發貨前依TBS PVoC計畫取得符合性證書（CoC）。（2）可接受的檢測基準——實際路徑為IECEE NCB依據IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）出具的IECEE CB體系檢測報告，PVoC機構可據此簽發CoC；僅引用GB國家偏差的國內CCC報告可能需補充。（3）插頭/電源線與電壓——器具須按230 V/50 Hz供應並配適合坦尚尼亞的BS 1363（G型）插頭，與中國國內插頭及220 V標稱電壓不同。（4）標識/說明書——產品標識及TBS標誌以及用戶說明書須符合TBS要求（英語為坦尚尼亞官方語言之一）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity to the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 is required, demonstrated via a TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment and the TBS mark before goods clear customs at Dar es Salaam
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical-safety conformity for household refrigerators in Tanzania is mandatory under the TZS adopting IEC 60335-2-24 and is evidenced through a TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity per consignment plus the TBS mark. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Tanzanian TZS derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical gap is small, but a Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted on its own — an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1 is the usual basis for the CoC, and the appliance must be supplied for 230 V / 50 Hz with a BS 1363 (Type G) plug.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚家用电冰箱的电气安全符合性依据采用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS标准为强制要求，并通过每批货物的TBS PVoC符合性证书及TBS标志予以证明。由于GB 4706.13与坦桑尼亚TZS均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术差距较小，但中国CCC证书本身不被接受——依据IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB体系报告是签发CoC的常规依据，且器具须按230 V/50 Hz供应并配BS 1363（G型）插头。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞家用電冰箱的電氣安全符合性依據採用IEC 60335-2-24的TZS標準為強制要求，並通過每批貨物的TBS PVoC符合性證書及TBS標誌予以證明。由於GB 4706.13與坦尚尼亞TZS均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術差距較小，但中國CCC證書本身不被接受——依據IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1的IECEE CB體系報告是簽發CoC的常規依據，且器具須按230 V/50 Hz供應並配BS 1363（G型）插頭。
